Bus Timings

X92 Bus Timings Ghubaiba Bus Station to Dubai Investment Park

February 1, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The route is vital for commuters traveling between these regions, ensuring smooth access to various neighborhoods, businesses, and facilities. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or visiting loved ones, Bus X92 is a convenient and efficient way to get around.

Bus Timings

Bus X92 operates frequently throughout the day, catering to both early commuters and those traveling later in the evening. Below are the scheduled timings:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Dubai Investment Park
04:58 06:48
05:20 07:10
05:45 07:35
06:05 07:55
06:25 08:15
06:50 08:40
07:10 09:00
07:30 09:20
07:55 09:45
08:15 10:05
08:35 10:25
09:00 10:50
09:25 11:15
09:50 11:40
10:15 12:05
10:40 12:30
11:05 12:55
11:35 13:25
12:05 13:55
12:35 14:25
13:00 14:50
13:30 15:20
14:00 15:50
14:30 16:20
15:05 16:55
15:40 17:30
16:20 18:10
16:55 18:45
17:30 19:20
17:59 19:49
18:25 20:15
18: 55 20:45
19:25 21:15

20:25 22:15
20:55 22:45
21:20 23:10
21:50 23:40
22:20 00:10
22:40 00:30
23:00 00:50

Download PDF Bus X92

Bus X92 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for X92 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers on Bus X92 can pay for their journey using a Nol card, Dubai’s contactless payment system for public transport. The fare for the X92 bus from Al Ghubaiba Station to Dubai Investment Park is 25 AED. Nol cards provide a cashless and convenient way to pay, with fares varying based on the zones traveled. You can easily top up your Nol card at RTA service centers or vending machines throughout the city.

Route Overview

Bus X92 begins its journey at Ghubaiba Bus Station, a major transport hub in Dubai, and travels through important stops before reaching its destination at Dubai Investment Park. Here’s a look at some of the key stops along the route:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station A major hub and starting point, offering easy access to central Dubai and numerous connecting routes.

  2. Department of Health A key stop for passengers heading to healthcare services.

3.

  1. Dubai Natural Gas Co Limited A prominent industrial stop along the route.

  2. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Main Gate Crucial for those working in Dubai’s significant free zone area.

6.

7.

  1. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket A major shopping location in the Jebel Ali area.

  2. Al Khaleej Al Madina Supermarket Serving local shopping needs along the route.

  3. Falcon Chemicals A stop for those working in industrial sectors.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Shoba Contracting Labour Camp Providing transport for workers in this area.

  2. Dubai Contracting Labour Camp Another labor camp stop serving the local workforce.

  3. Dubai Investment Park The final destination, home to various businesses, residential areas, and key facilities.

Accessibility Features

Dubai Bus X92 is equipped with accessibility features to accommodate differently-abled passengers. These include low-floor buses for easy boarding, designated seating areas, and audio-visual systems to assist passengers with hearing or visual impairments. The RTA ensures that public transport in Dubai remains inclusive and accessible to all.

Connectivity and Intersections

Bus X92 provides seamless connectivity with other bus routes and metro stations. This connectivity ensures that getting around the city, whether you’re commuting locally or traveling further, is convenient and efficient.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  • Ghubaiba Bus Station

  • Jebel Ali Free Zone
  • Dubai Investment Park

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus X92 from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Dubai Investment Park offers a fascinating journey that takes you through some of Dubai’s bustling commercial and industrial zones.

The journey concludes at Dubai Investment Park, a rapidly expanding residential and industrial community. Along the way, passengers can observe the city’s dynamic transformation from traditional markets to modern skyscrapers, showcasing the diverse landscape of Dubai.

Tips and Travel Advice

For a smooth journey on Bus X92, it’s recommended to travel during off-peak hours to avoid rush hour congestion.

Bus X92 is an essential part of Dubai’s public transport system, offering reliable and frequent service between Ghubaiba Bus Station and Dubai Investment Park. Whether you’re a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, this route provides a convenient and eco-friendly way to explore Dubai.

To explore the full network of Dubai’s buses, you can also check out the comprehensive guide to all bus routes across the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 1, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
